evidence: Go now! The enkum are to take the Boat of Heaven away from her!
Go now! The fifty giants of Eridug are to take the Boat of Heaven away from her!
Go now! The fifty lahama of the subterranean waters are to take the Boat of Heaven away from her!
Go now! All the great fish together ... are to take the Boat of Heaven away from her!
the guardians of Unug are to take the Boat of Heaven away from her!
The Id-surungal ... are to take the Boat of Heaven away from her!
AI_Comment: Intention propagates cyclically from Enki's commands to seizures, countered by Inana's defenses. Overload in repetitive dialogues and seizures; dissonance in father's duplicity accusations. Power and attraction, with iterative pursuits reflecting desire to reclaim. Instability per cycle, building tension without break.
